prompt: Use $ultimate-design to turn a dense market validation report into an executive visual web page. Create DESIGN.md from the source, preserve the original request, and verify desktop and mobile screenshots.
Use $ultimate-design to design a supplier-risk triage dashboard for marketplace operators. Start from product problem and success signal, then implement a responsive prototype.
Use $ultimate-design to convert a long strategy memo into a 12-slide HTML PPT deck for a board meeting. Every slide needs one claim, supporting evidence, and deck-level visual validation.
Use $ultimate-design to create 9 vertical Xiaohongshu cards explaining a technical product. Export each card as PNG and provide a contact sheet.
Use $ultimate-design to design a landing page for a privacy-first AI note app. Avoid generic AI SaaS visuals, define a distinctive color posture, and verify responsive layout.
Use $ultimate-design to create a compact brand system for an AI research lab. Include color, type, imagery, tone, do/don't rules, and a reusable DESIGN.md.
Use $ultimate-design to audit and repair an existing HTML page with spacing, hierarchy, and accessibility issues. Fix P0/P1 issues and leave validation evidence.
Use $ultimate-design to bootstrap DESIGN.md for a project that has no design contract. Infer from product copy and components, mark assumptions, and validate the contract.
Use $ultimate-design to turn a benchmark result table into a readable data visualization page. Include source/unit labels and avoid color-only meaning.
Use $ultimate-design to art-direct a conference poster. State print blockers, assumed size/bleed/PPI, typography hierarchy, and export verification limits.
